snippet: Where an employee considers they have been treated unfairly or unreasonably in any matter related to their employment including a request for flexible work arrangements, they may access review, grievance or dispute resolution processes to seek to resolve the issue. For more information, refer to Grievances — Teaching Service . Implementation Implementation policy guidelines for Flexible Work Appendix 1 — Overview of flexible work i...
